metadata.title: React Components
metadata.description: This is a plugin for Obsidian. It allows you to write and use React components with Jsx inside your Obsidian notes.

regex.source: Notice(`"${file.basename}" is not a valid function name`)
regex.target: Notice(`"${file.basename}" 不是一个有效的函数名`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Files in this folder will be available as components/functions.')
regex.target: .setDesc('此文件夹中的文件将作为组件/函数可用')

regex.source: .setDesc('Useful to disable if reloading components is costly (like if they perform api calls or read a lot of files). To refresh the components manually, run the `Refresh React Components` command')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果重新加载组件的成本很高（比如它们执行api调用或读取大量文件），禁用该选项很有用。需要手动刷新组件，请执行“refresh React components”命令')
